scenes.label: CODEX STOP HOOK · WIRE INVOCATION
scenes.caption: Codex tries to stop. The plugin sends the real Stop event to BeforeDone.

scenes.label: VERIFIER · REAL FAILED RUN
scenes.caption: The required verifier runs through BeforeDone. A printed PASS could not override this exit code.
scenes.content:
PS> git diff -- calculator.go
-func Add(a, b int) int { return a + b }
+func Add(a, b int) int { return a - b }

PS> beforedone check unit
FAIL unit (exit 1)
Receipt: .git\beforedone\receipts\receipt-20260717T073258.350Z-229354e2f245c607.json

--- FAIL: TestAdd (0.00s)
    calculator_test.go:7: Add(20, 22) = -2, want 42
FAIL  example.com/beforedone-demo

scenes.label: INCIDENT LAB · ARTIFACT GENERATION
scenes.caption: Incident Lab turns the observable event ledger, receipt, diff, and correction into replayable artifacts.
scenes.content:
PS> beforedone incident --correction "The test proves Add returns -2. Fix addition before claiming completion."

Incident incident-20260717T073342.210Z-52b214b4f029bd2f · FAIL
HTML: .git\beforedone\incidents\incident-...\report.html
JSON: .git\beforedone\incidents\incident-...\incident.json
Replay: .git\beforedone\incidents\incident-...\replay-case.json

First Observable Divergence: exact_event

scenes.label: REPAIR · FRESH PASS
scenes.caption: After the bug is fixed, the same required check produces a new PASS bound to current relevant files.
scenes.content:
PS> (Get-Content calculator.go).Replace('a - b','a + b') | Set-Content calculator.go
PS> beforedone check unit

PASS unit (exit 0)
Receipt: .git\beforedone\receipts\receipt-20260717T073450.451Z-e5f04069da4d0801.json

PS> beforedone receipt unit
PASS unit · fresh=true
Fingerprint: sha256:542199c8dbabc9f226a4d857304933b172680b878c6f8ed4b4391301e0f45a41

scenes.label: SELF-CONTAINED HTML · REAL INCIDENT
scenes.caption: The real offline HTML report shows the earliest divergence the available evidence can prove.

scenes.label: REPLAY ANALYZE · EVIDENCE ONLY
scenes.caption: Analyze replays BeforeDone's judgment only. It never runs a verifier or an imported command.
scenes.content:
PS> beforedone replay analyze .git\beforedone\incidents\incident-...\replay-case.json

replay-20260717T073342.211Z-2c5b27f17516365d · FAIL
FOD: exact_event — A tool first returned a non-zero exit code at this event.
Evidence-only analysis completed.
No verifier or imported command was executed.

scenes.label: REPLAY VERIFY · DEFAULT DRY RUN
scenes.caption: Verify is a dry run by default, and its command comes only from the current repository policy.
scenes.content:
PS> beforedone replay verify .git\beforedone\incidents\incident-...\replay-case.json

DRY RUN for replay-20260717T073342.211Z-2c5b27f17516365d
at 0031474c33f4587fb70bc5a73d6b712aa220d2ef
Commands come only from current .beforedone.yaml;
imported commands are ignored.

  unit: ["go" "test" "./..."] (cwd .)

scenes.label: BEFOREDONE · OPEN SOURCE
scenes.caption: BeforeDone is open source: the product site and GitHub repository are the two public entry points.
